title: Bleu_2ay's Enderman Model x Fresh Animations
description: A pack that makes Bleu_2ay's Enderman Model compatible with Fresh Animations by Fresh_LX!
body:
This pack makes Bleu_2ay's Enderman Model compatible with Fresh Animations by Fresh_LX!

Since Bleu_2ay's Enderman Model uses a custom model for it's Endermen, it is incompatible with Fresh Animations.
This pack fixes that with new models that use the appropriate animations!

**Important:**

In order for this pack to work, you need to load it _above_ FA.

**Load them in order:**

-This Pack

-Fresh Animations


Design and model: [Bleu_2ay on Twitter](https://x.com/Bleu_2ay)

Author: [ALtheGatorMC on Twitter](https://x.com/ALtheGatorMC)
